# cyan

Wraps its argument in the ANSI escape codes for cyan text.

```rad
cyan(_item: any) -> str
```

```rad
cyan("Hello")        // -> "Hello" wrapped in the cyan escape
cyan(42)             // -> "42" wrapped in the cyan escape
```

## See also

`blue`, `green`, `color_rgb`
